summary: Review of post-external-feedback changes: conditions package now delegates to meta.SetStatusCondition/FindStatusCondition (replacing custom implementation), plugins.RenderPluginConfig returns error on duplicate ConfigSection, and RenderPastePipeline guards against empty AppName. All tests pass (99.2% coverage), golangci-lint clean, go vet clean.

tests_checklist.item: Tests exist and pass for all changed functions
Edge cases are covered (nil, empty, duplicates, boundary)
Test conventions followed (gomega dot-import, NewGomegaWithT, table-driven)

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (meta.SetStatusCondition delegation per plan spec)
No dead code or unnecessary complexity
SPDX headers and Feature: CC-0004 tracking present

security_checklist.item: No external input handling (pure functions only)
No Kubernetes API calls in any changed function

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
Changes are minimal and focused on reviewer feedback
No scope creep beyond external review fixes
RenderPluginConfig signature change has no external callers (safe)

dry_yagni_checklist.item: Delegates to upstream meta helpers instead of reimplementing

fail_fast_checklist.item: RenderPluginConfig returns error early on duplicate ConfigSection
Empty AppName handled explicitly rather than producing trailing whitespace

defensive_checklist.item: All external inputs validated (duplicate detection, empty guards)
